name: EU AI Act
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external legal/regulatory AI crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: The EU AI Act can support obligations, risk classes, documentation, and oversight comparison.
The EU AI Act can be mapped to policy reference and governance boundary terms.
non_claims: The EU AI Act does not prove transition admissibility.
Regulatory compliance does not automatically grant execution authority inside StegVerse.
The wiki relationship record is not legal advice or acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.claims: regulatory obligation, risk classification, documentation, traceability, human oversight
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, legal advice, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external legal authority context; no StegVerse execution authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct regulatory relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform policy reference and review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Policy Reference, Governance Boundary, Review Posture, Reconstructability
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, legal overclaim, or authority overclaim
